title: Confluence Music
body:
# Confluence Music

Since putting music directly into the Confluence: Otherworld cause the mod to be too bulky, music was used as a separate subsidiary module.

So far, we have composed 23 OSTs. In the future, we will continue to replenish the OST and gradually support custom music packs. It is expected that there will be more than 80 songs in the full version.

Confluence: Otherworld OST mainly learns and borrows from the soundtracks of Minecraft and Terraria. I can only say that what C418 and Scott Lloyd left behind is enough for us to learn and make a whole set of osts, hoping that these music can not only bring a different experience, but also capture memories of the past.
